title: Tala Stainless Steel Oven Thermometer with Celsius and Fahrenheit Colour Coded Markings, can Stand or hang, Easy to Read
features: EASY READ: The Tala Oven Thermometer are clear and easy to read with a Blue to Read temperture scale to show the best tempertures
CLEAR MARKINGS: Produced with clear markings to cook your favourites meats to your likely, Markings include Chicken, Lamb, Pork, Beef and Veal
FAHRENHEIT & CELSIUS: This Thermometer displays both Fahrenheit and Celsius for quick and easy use
INSTANT READ: This thermometer is design to react quickly and will display within seconds a true read of the conditions, for a precise reading please leavein place for 60 seconds
DURABLE: Built from heat-resistant stainless steel for long-lasting performance in high temperatures
description: From the manufacturer About Us Tala is one of Britain's oldest and best-loved kitchenware brands, trusted by cooks all over the world since 1899. We have a rich history of manufacturing kitchen, home and utility wares. Tala has been manufacturing in England since 1899 and today many of our iconic products are still made by hand in England, by small teams of skilled people. We continue to strive to develop invaluable kitchen tools for beauty and efficiency. To buy Tala is to buy something underscored by generations of trust. It is a brand that has developed to meet the needs and wants of all homes to give the best quality in every product.
